revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-310

An organic compound consisting of large molecules made up of many small repeating molecules or mers.


Note: Many synthetic polymers exist, such as polyester, polyethylene, polypropylene, polyvinyl chloride (PVC), etc...

{{IALAFooter}}
